settings.heading: Bespoke Jewellery Designs
settings.text: For those seeking something truly unique, we transform your most cherished ideas into tangible masterpieces.

settings.heading: A Personalised Design Experience
settings.text: "We believe there is nothing quite like having a piece of jewellery designed exclusively for you. Whether creating the perfect engagement ring or reimagining unworn family jewellery, our workshop in Chichester is where the magic happens."

settings.title: The Design Journey
settings.subtitle: Our step-by-step process from concept to creation

settings.heading: Consultation
settings.text: Meet with our designers to discuss your ideas, budget, and inspiration. We listen to your story to understand exactly what you need.

settings.heading: Stones & Metals
settings.text: Hand-pick your perfect metals and diamonds or gemstones from a curated selection sourced by our GIA-certified gemologists.

settings.heading: Design & CAD
settings.text: Detailed hand sketches or 3D CAD renders provide photorealistic images of your piece before a single metal is cast.

settings.heading: Handcrafting
settings.text: Our master goldsmiths bring the design to life in our on-site workshop, finishing, setting, and polishing to perfection.

settings.heading: Explore Our Specialities
settings.subheading: Expertise in every detail, from tradition to innovation.

settings.heading: Our Portfolio
settings.subheading: A curation of recent bespoke commissions that blend artistry with emotion.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subheading: Clarity on our bespoke process in Chichester.

settings.heading: How long does the bespoke process take?
settings.row_content: Typically, a bespoke commission takes between 4 to 8 weeks from the final design approval to the finished piece. This allows time for sourcing gemstones, casting, hallmarking, and setting.

settings.heading: Can I reuse gold or gemstones from old jewellery?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. Remodelling family heirlooms is one of our specialities. We can often melt down your yellow gold to create a new band, or reset your diamonds into a modern platinum setting.

settings.heading: Do I need to book an appointment?
settings.row_content: We invite you to experience our jewellery in the way that suits you best. You can book a private consultation in our showroom, or arrange a Home Visit where an expert jeweller brings our collection to you in Chichester.

settings.heading: Visit Our Showroom
settings.address: 64 South Street, Chichester, PO19 1EE, West Sussex
settings.home_visit_text: Our designers will bring samples, gemstones, and design tools to the comfort of your own home.
